no: Requires portraits/ directory to exist (not a file). May conflict with Portrait Gender Separator.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

in.t: Create portraits/ directory in BG2EE game folder if it does not exist. A stale file named portraits (no extension) may block directory creation — rename or delete it first.

ki.description: Valen COPYs valenL.bmp to a portraits/ directory that doesn't exist. WeiDU fails with 'cannot open target' and rolls back.
ki.workaround: Create a portraits/ directory in the game folder before installing. A stale file named 'portraits' (no extension) may also block — rename or delete it.

conflicts.reason: VampireWorld cn:9 adds Valen to Bodhi Stronghold. Skip if using the Valen EET mod instead.

sum: Adds Valen, a vampire fighter, as a joinable BG2 NPC with romance option and a storyline about undeath and redemption.

co.no: NOT INSTALLED Setup-Valen.tp2 COPYs valenL.bmp to portraits/ which doesn't exist. WeiDU fails with 'cannot open target', rolls back. Workaround: create portraits/ directory in game folder before installing. Install script must ensure this directory exists.

in.t: Create a portraits/ directory in the game folder if it does not already exist.
